title: CSV Engine (tina) does not handle json type
poc: create table t1 (c json not null) ENGINE CSV;
key_bug_features: CSV Engine does not read json-type fields
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data JSON NOT NULL) ENGINE CSV;
CREATE TABLE t3 (ref_id INT, description VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES t2(id)) ENGINE CSV;
SELECT t2.data, t3.description FROM t2 JOIN t3 ON t2.id = t3.ref_id;
